title: CutoffFunctional
summary: Packages cutoff-dependent quantities whose asymptotic expansion defines a renormalized value.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Packages cutoff-dependent quantities whose asymptotic expansion defines a renormalized value.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Ambient/PE/Renormalization/CutoffFunctional.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Data/interface: Cutoff Functional. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: structure CutoffFunctional (Obj : Type u) (R : Type v) [Zero R]

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: renormalized Value. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def renormalizedValue (CF : CutoffFunctional Obj R) (obj : Obj) : R

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: anomaly Value. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def anomalyValue (CF : CutoffFunctional Obj R) (obj : Obj) : R

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: renormalized Value eq coeff zero. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem renormalizedValue_eq_coeff_zero (CF : CutoffFunctional Obj R) (obj : Obj) : CF.renormalizedValue obj = (CF.expansion obj).coeff 0

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: anomaly Value eq log Coeff. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem anomalyValue_eq_logCoeff (CF : CutoffFunctional Obj R) (obj : Obj) : CF.anomalyValue obj = (CF.expansion obj).logCoeff

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: renormalized Value. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def renormalizedValue {Obj : Type u} {R : Type v} [Zero R] (CF : CutoffFunctional Obj R) (obj : Obj) : R

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: anomaly Value. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def anomalyValue {Obj : Type u} {R : Type v} [Zero R] (CF : CutoffFunctional Obj R) (obj : Obj) : R

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Data/interface: Renormalizable Geometric Object. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
